headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +29.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 141% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Fears dominate despite negative scoring due to below-average engagement, but 15 strong-intensity quotes show some people are deeply concerned about specific issues.

• Frustrations dropped significantly from yesterday's peak but remain well above typical levels with 74 strong-intensity quotes driving continued venting.

• Optimism hit its highest point in the 79-day period, recovering strongly from yesterday's negativity with 67 strong-intensity quotes showing genuine positivity.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
